props.name: className
props.comment: Extra CSS class appended to the wrapping sidebar group.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.comment: Initial open state for labeled groups.

props.name: label
props.comment: Optional section label. Omit it for the ungrouped resource section.

props.name: menuClassName
props.comment: Extra CSS class appended to the underlying sidebar menu.

props.name: resources
props.comment:
Resource names to render in this group. When omitted, all registered
resources with `hasList === true` are rendered automatically.
